title: papaver rhoeas proles roubiei
intro: Papaver rhoeas proles roubiei, also known as the French poppy, is a variety of the species Papaver rhoeas, a flowering plant in the poppy family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as providing relief from anxiety and insomnia, and it has been used to treat a variety of ailments, including menstrual cramps, headaches, and respiratory issues. Papaver rhoeas proles roubiei can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
